name: ORECAP Invest Corp.
description: ORECAP Invest Corp. is a merchant bank focused on the critical and precious metals sector. The company specializes in acquiring assets, creating go-public events, and managing royalties, alongside engaging in activist investing. By focusing on high-quality people and projects, ORECAP ensures its ventures are well-financed and positioned for success. The firm provides its shareholders with unique exposure to seed-round investments in high-quality resource companies and various co-investment opportunities. With an established track record of value and company creation, ORECAP continues to play a strategic role in the development and financing of the mining industry.
